string.text: Unidentified Item

Which story mod this is from – UNKNOWN!!!

 %c[ui_gray_3]Grandpa Lee:
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] How to "fix" this – I DON'T KNOW!!!
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] The file in "GAMMA" refers to "Storylines 3.0".

 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] How to "fix" this – I DON'T KNOW!!!
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] No matching files found in different builds!!!

Unidentified Item

Which story mod this is from – UNKNOWN!!!

 %c[ui_gray_3]Grandpa Lee:
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] How to "fix" this – I DON'T KNOW!!!
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] No matching files found in different builds!!!
Key to the Military Helicopter Crate

You need to find the crate that was on the military helicopter. The helicopter crashed somewhere near the center of the Valley of Rustles.

 %c[ui_gray_3]Grandpa Lee:
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] Special thanks to KuKi4 (from the "A.N.T.H.O.L.O.G.Y 1.2" Discord server) for helping to gather all data about this quest!
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] Description was created by me.

You need to find the crate that was on the military helicopter. The helicopter crashed somewhere near the center of the Valley of Rustles.

 %c[ui_gray_3]Grandpa Lee:
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] Special thanks to KuKi4 (from the "A.N.T.H.O.L.O.G.Y 1.2" Discord server) for helping to gather all data about this quest!
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] Description was created by me.
Rockefeller's Laptop

Rockefeller asks to find his laptop, which was left in the military helicopter. You need to find the key to the crate, which is held by Captain Kozlov, and find the crate near the crashed helicopter.

 %c[ui_gray_3]Grandpa Lee:
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] Special thanks to KuKi4 (from the "A.N.T.H.O.L.O.G.Y 1.2" Discord server) for helping to gather all data about this quest!
 %c[d_red] • %c[ui_gray_2] Description was created by me.
